summary: Comprehensive testing of Industrial Decision Interface latest updates. All tests PASSED. Features tested: new design with blue palette, logo display, Team page with 3 expandable cards, Decision Gates with 4 gates and contact forms, Sources & Method page with data acknowledgment section, footer branding, sidebar navigation, and language toggle (EN/FR).

details: Root endpoint returns Hello World
Status endpoint GET returns list
Status endpoint POST creates status check
Contact endpoint validates required fields (422 for invalid)
Contact endpoint accepts valid structure (200 or 500 based on SMTP)
Homepage loads with new logo (ID logo with blue #207BFF color)
All 11 sidebar navigation items visible
Team navigation link works correctly
Language toggle EN/FR functional
Operator panel shows both contacts (Lucas Ansel & Ayoub Bouzalmad)
Footer displays 'Industrial Decision' and 'Engineering Better Decisions'
Team page loads with correct structure
3 team member cards visible (Lucas, Ayoub, David)
Lucas Ansel card expandable with expertise details
Ayoub Bouzalmad card expandable with technical skills
David Ansel card expandable with industrial expertise
Collective Approach section present
Decision Gates page loads correctly
4 gates displayed (Discreet, Exploratory, Urgent, Post-Crisis)
Discreet Gate content verified (48-72 hours)
Exploratory Gate content verified (3-5 business days)
Urgent Gate content verified (12-24h initial contact)
Post-Crisis Gate content verified (2-3 business days)
Gate entry modal opens with form
Introduction form section present
Contact form submits via API
Sources & Method page loads
Data Sources section with Banque de France and Altares
Data Acknowledgment: Jean-Baptiste Borron (Industrial Expert)
Data Acknowledgment: ALMA Machines outils (Data Partner)
Audit Methodology section present
Composite Indices: IPI and URI displayed
Governance & Display Rules section present
Interface Classification section present
French translation works (Sources & Méthode)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Industrial Decision Interface fully tested. All new features working: Team page with 3 members (Lucas, Ayoub, David), Decision Gates with 4 gates and contact forms connected to SMTP backend, Sources & Method with Jean-Baptiste Borron and ALMA acknowledgments, footer with Industrial Decision branding, language toggle EN/FR. No critical issues found.
